notes: Fixed the Close & redeem action. Previously 'Close' opened the multi-step timeline editor, where the user had to pick a month, click '+ Add change', AND then 'Save timeline' — easy to do partially, so nothing got written and nothing changed. Replaced it with a dedicated, single-purpose Close modal: pick the close-from month (defaults to the current month) and, for investments, see/edit the redeem amount (defaults to the projected current balance). On confirm it (1) writes a close lifecycle event — visible in the card's history and zeroing the instrument in the projection from that month onward — and (2) for an investment closing in the current month or earlier, immediately opens the Journal redemption pre-filled with the amount, creating a real transaction that lands in savings. Future-dated closes stay projection-only until they arrive. Verified the engine zeroes the instrument from the close month forward. (Redeem = partial/full cash-out via Journal remains as-is and was working.)
